endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.InfrastructureInsights.Admin/regionHealths/{location}/serviceHealths/{serviceRegistrationId}/resourceHealths
endpoints.description: Returns a list of each resource's health under a service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{SERVICEREGISTRATIONID}} with a real serviceregistrationid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.InfrastructureInsights.Admin/regionHealths/{location}/serviceHealths/{serviceRegistrationId}/resourceHealths/{resourceRegistrationId}
endpoints.description: Returns the requested health information about a resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEREGISTRATIONID}} with a real resourceregistrationid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{SERVICEREGISTRATIONID}} with a real serviceregistrationid. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
